rules.rule_text:
rule Atomic
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "Atomic system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "Userinfo:" ascii
		$x2 = "MetaMask Info:" ascii
		$x3 = "Private Keys:" ascii
		$x4 = "Debanks:" ascii
		$x5 = "ProductName:        macOS" ascii
		$x6 = "BuildVersion:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
